description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code on every push to the main branch, on pull requests to the main branch, and on a weekly schedule. Run a single ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions, contents, and write permission for security events. Use a matrix strategy to analyze C++ code with CodeQL, checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, installing dependencies, building the project with a bash script, and performing CodeQL analysis.
